description: The image captures a cozy corner of a room where a white brick fireplace stands against a beige wall. The fireplace, devoid of any fire, houses a black screen on its mantel. The screen displays a television program, with the time and channel visible as "9:34 CH3". The fireplace is situated next to a window, allowing natural light to filter into the room. On the right side of the image, a white curtain hangs, adding to the homely atmosphere. The scene is devoid of any human presence, giving it an air of tranquility and quietude.
